item.title: Memories
item.description: Thought of the Day It’s like my very first memory, which I guess is the first time I was alive. - Stephen Chbosky Thinking about my first memory is actually much harder than it sounds, as if finding a needle in the haystack. Beside that I agree that a lot of our long term memories are moments that affect us to our core & events which shape something fundamental to our being.
